guidance: Teach a repeatable framework or mental model a service-business owner can apply this week. Name the steps concretely. Premium and confident, never generic.
evidence_note: Grounded in Black Arrow's method and general operating logic; no invented stats.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Authority / Frameworks' was the most under-served eligible category (target 25%, recent 21%).
post_rationale: Carousels lead saves and depth for B2B/educational content, and this gives owners a genuine, unclaimed decision framework (lead volume vs. response speed) distinct from the four-system mental model and forensic diagnostic already shipped. The invented response-rate statistic was removed and replaced with an honest directional pattern to keep every claim defensible.

guidance: Use a credible external study to explain why a capability matters. Qualified language: 'Research suggests...', 'The study found...'.
evidence_note: Attribute the source. NEVER imply Black Arrow produced the result or achieves the same without evidence.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Third-Party Research / Market Evidence' was the most under-served eligible category (target 10%, recent 7%).
post_rationale: Fills the under-served Third-Party Research slot with a fresh, rigorously sourced academic study (distinct from the HubSpot stat already used), delivered as the carousel format research shows wins saves for authority/educational content.
